message:
🐛 Fix kc-agent binary path: align docs, Makefile, and startup scripts (#11084)

The auto-update code in update_checker.go was falling back to placing
binaries (console, kc-agent) in the repo root when not found in PATH.
This contradicts the Makefile, README, and startup scripts which all
expect binaries in bin/.

Changes:
- Fix 5 fallback paths in update_checker.go to use bin/ subdirectory
- Add mkdir -p bin before builds (matching Makefile behavior)
- Fix executeBinaryUpdate console fallback path to ./bin/console

Fixes #11078

Signed-off-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
